@GoPro

item.title: Chia seed pudding time!! Recipe⬇️ *makes 4 jars -2tbsp chia see...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Chia seed pudding time!! Recipe⬇️ *makes 4 jars -2tbsp chia seeds (per jar) -2cups milk of choice -1 1/2tbsp sweetener (honey, maple syrup, sugar) -dash of salt -cinnamon -dash of vanilla -toppings: I like to add fresh fruit in the morning !! **you can add whatever you want to them! -add chia seeds to jars, mix milk, sugar, salt, cinnamon, vanilla in a measuring cup. Taste and adjust (you may want it sweeter, I like it barely sweet!) -Add 1/2cup of milk mixture to each jar. Mix well. Put in the fridge. -After 30min-1hour mix again. Otherwise it’ll form hard clumps overnight lol -add back to the fridge and it’s good to eat whenever you want! * lasts 5 days !!

item.title: Sandwich making time in IRELAND!! Kelly (our boss) told us we ha...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Sandwich making time in IRELAND!! Kelly (our boss) told us we had exactly 5 minutes to get ingredients and I quote “no giggling, no shopping or looking around.” Listen, we tried our best and Kelly understood 🥲

item.title: Pasta Alla Vodka with Italian Sausage has been my go-to dinner r...
item.description:
View on TikTok


Pasta Alla Vodka with Italian Sausage has been my go-to dinner recently!! Recipe below! I noticed I often feel bloated after eating this BUT ’s Debloat Gummies have helped a ton! :) Ingredients: -3-4 italian sausages (removed from casing) -11oz dried pasta -1.5tbsp olive oil -1/2 yellow onion finely diced -2 garlic cloves, finely chopped -1/2tsp red chili flakes -2.5tbsp tomato paste -2.5tbsp vodka -1.5 cups tomato passata (tomato puree) -1/4cup heavy cream -2tbsp mascarpone -1tbsp cold unsalted butter (cubed) -salt to taste -optional toppings: red chili flakes, pepper, parmesan, basil recipe: -saute italian sausage until fully cooked and remove from pan -add olive oil and onions, cook on low heat until softened (5-7min). Add garlic and cook until fragrant (1 min). add red chili flakes and let bloom for 1-2 min. -add tomato paste and stir to fully combine, cook until darkened in color (3-5min). Add vodka and once fully absorbed, pour in the passata. let simmer for 20 min. -start boiling water and cooking pasta according to the package (1-2 min less than recommended) -remove the vodka sauce from the heat and add heavy cream and mascarpone. stir to fully incorporate. add salt if needed -once pasta is almost done, add a ladle (about 1/3cup) pasta water to the sauce. stir. add pasta to the sauce and toss for 1-2 min to fully coat. toss in cold butter and stir until fully melted -stir in sausage and serve immediately. top with whatever your heart desires :)
@lemme #LemmePartner

item.title:
I’m always in the mood for some tacos !! Recipe below :)
In...
item.description:
View on TikTok


I’m always in the mood for some tacos !! Recipe below :) Ingredients: -4-5 chicken thighs -chicken marinade: 1/4cup Chosen Foods classic mayo, 1 chipotle in adobo (minced) and 2tsp of its sauce, 1tsp salt, 1/4tsp paprika, 1/4tsp cumin, 3 grated garlic cloves, 1 lime juiced -flour or corn tortillas -verde salsa: 6-7 tomatillos, 1/2 white onion, 3 garlic cloves, 1 jalapeño, 1 serrano pepper, 1/2 cup cilantro, 1 lime juiced, 1tbsp chosen foods avocado oil, salt -toppings: diced onions, sliced radish, and cilantro Recipe: -mix together marinade ingredients and add to chicken. Massage and let rest for 30 minutes-4hours -preheat oven to 450F -remove tomatillo husks, wash well, and dry. Add to a parchment lined sheet pan with 1/4 white onion, 3 garlic cloves (you can leave the skin on), and peppers. spray with Chosen Foods avocado oil spray and sprinkle with salt. -bake for 15 min until blistered and brown -add tomatillos, onion, peppers (optional: remove seeds to make it less spicy), garlic (remove skins), cilantro, lime, 1/4 raw white onion, and salt to a food processor. Pulse and taste, adjust to your liking. Put in the fridge -heat a large cast iron on medium-high heat. Cook chicken 5-8 min each side until internal temp is 165F, let rest. chop into bite sized -heat tortillas, add cubed chicken, diced onion, verde salsa, radish slices, and cilantro. ENJOY :)
@Chosen Foods #ChosenPartner
